case_title: BROWN-NORSHAKA, SANDRA MRS. VS CITY ATTORNEY C/O MUNI

docket_entries.description: CLAIM BEFORE THE LEGAL DEADLINE. (SEE FORM SC- 150).
PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILED THE LETTER OF DENIAL OF HER CLAIM FROM THE CONTROLLERS OFFICE.
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY, AND I FILED A CLAIM WITH THE AGENCY.MY CLAIM WAS DENIED BY THE AGENCY, OR THE AGENCY DID NOT ACT ON MY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY BROWN-NORSHAKA, SANDRA MRS. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY ATTORNEY C/O MUNI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM AGAINST THE CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY ATTORNEY C/O MUNI
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN-NORSHAKA, SANDRA MRS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY ATTORNEY C/O MUNI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
